offer: For freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 invoices/month, inconsistent timecard entries cause payroll errors. We convert timecard data into payroll-ready files instead of manual tracking and entry into QuickBooks.
problem: Inconsistent timecard entries lead to payroll errors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for QuickBooks freelancers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about payroll issues
DM outreach to freelancers with demo video
Share insights in freelancer forums and groups
try_it: Let users try manual entry of timecard data with alerts
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Develop a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Set default reminder schedules for entries
Enable CSV import for existing timecard data
Offer one-click export for payroll reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
